    1. main(String[])

Class TestClientMain

java.lang.Object
edu.uky.cs.nil.tt.TestClientMain
public class TestClientMain extends Object
The main entry point for the Tandem Tales Test Client. This class reads the user's preferences from the command line arguments passed to the JVM starts a test client with those settings.
Author:
Stephen G. Ware

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    AUTHORS
    The people who contributed significantly to this project
    static final String
    DEFAULT_NAME
    The default name used by this client if one is not specified
    static final int
    DEFAULT_PORT
    The default network port to be used if one is not specified
    static final String
    DEFAULT_URL
    The default server URL to used if one is not specified
    static final String
    GM_KEY
    The key used to specify that this client wants the game master role
    static final String
    HELP_KEY
    The key used to print the usage instructions
    static final String
    NAME
    The name of this project
    static final String
    NAME_KEY
    The key used to specify this client's name
    static final String
    PARTNER_KEY
    The key used to specify the name of the partner this client wants to play with
    static final String
    PLAYER_KEY
    The key used to specify that this client wants the player role
    static final String
    PORT_KEY
    The key used to specify the network port to connect to
    static final String
    TITLE
    A full title, including name, version number, and authors
    static final String
    URL_KEY
    The key used to specify the URL of the server to connect to
    static final String
    USAGE
    Usage instructions for the test client executable
    static final String
    VERSION
    The current version of this project
    static final String
    WORLD_KEY
    The key used to specify the name of the story world this client wants to play in

  • Method Details

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception
      Configure and run a test client based on Java arguments passed from the terminal.
      Parameters:
      args - the arguments passed to this executable
      Throws:
      Exception - if a problem occurs during the client setup or while it is running
